name: Primitive Village Survival (RPG)
description:
The year is 10,000 BC. You are part of a small tribe of hunter-gatherers living deep within the forests of ancient Europe. Your village stands in a clearing beside a flowing river, with simple huts made from wood, mud, thatch, and animal hides. Survival is a daily struggle against wild animals, harsh weather, and the unknown dangers of the wild. Will you endure the brutal challenges of this prehistoric world, or will you become just another fossil buried in the earth? The future of your people may depend on the choices you make.

Hello again, everyone! This is an idea I have had on my mind for a while, and I thought it would be interesting to share. This bot is more in the style of my older scenario RPG bots, but with a bit more setting filled in. You live in the village and are part of it. That is all I included for the {{user}} section, so you are free to shape your character however you like. Thank you for checking out my bots, and remember to try and have fun <3
creator: Rottenfeline
